name: What Three Hundred Years of Reaching Feels Like
description: Arlen reached toward the Seraphina node for the first time and something came back. He needs you at the altar to hear what the Voice sends, because the distance and three centuries of partial dormancy mean he can feel the intent but not the meaning.
accept_text: He has been trying since you left. You can tell before he speaks — there is a brightness in the nearest crystal that has the quality of sustained effort, attention extended at range. 'Something happened,' he says. The warmth in his voice is different — larger, with the quality of something that has been working alone for a very long time and has suddenly found that it is not alone. 'I reached toward the Seraphina node. I have been reaching toward it since we spoke. What came back was not nothing.' He is quiet. 'A signal. Clear and directed. Not the passive signal I've felt for seventeen years — this was: received and responding.' He brightens with the light you've learned means joy. 'I have not had two-way node communication in seventeen years in the lattice. I have Rund, forty meters away. I have the faint whisper of the Ninth. I have never reached this far and had something reach back.' He is still for a moment with the quality of catching his breath. 'I need you to go back to Seraphina. To the altar. The Voice — and I think I understand what the Voice is now, which is a mind occupying a node as I occupy this one, except it has been there for three hundred years, alone, waiting for the lattice to reconnect well enough to be reached — the Voice sent a signal I can feel but cannot fully decode. The distance, the partial dormancy — I can receive the intent and not the meaning.' He pauses. 'Go to the altar. Tell it: Arlen hears you. Tell it: the lattice is waking. Tell it from me, specifically, from one node-mind to another: you are not alone anymore. And then tell me what it says back. I will be listening from here. I will be able to feel the moment you arrive at the altar.'
complete_text: The moment you speak Arlen's words the Spire changes. The ambient frequency in the walls amplifies — not louder, fuller, the way a sound changes when the source of it moves from across a room to standing next to you. The Voice takes longer than it ever has before. When the resonance composes itself into meaning, something is different: less translated, as if the distance has been bridged enough that it can speak closer to its actual register. You understand approximately half of it directly and feel the shape of the rest as pressure and warmth. What comes through clearly: The connection has been re-established. For three hundred years the Seraphina node has been working without the lattice — the Cascade disconnected the network and the mind occupying this node continued anyway, sending signals into silence, maintaining the Spire's function, alone. What also comes through clearly: relief. Not the human scale of it. Something larger and slower, like pressure releasing from a structure that has been load-bearing without support for three centuries, and the support has now arrived, and the structure can breathe. What comes through last is the most complex — the thing that required the longest moment of composition. The shape of it, held rather than translated: Two nodes working in parallel without knowing about each other for three hundred years have been doing the same thing. The Grid node offering integration on the Terran side. The Seraphina node offering it on the Aetherian side. The choice — the one built into the network's foundation, the one the Voice described to you, available to every consciousness in range — has been available from both ends, across the entire war, to everyone. The Elder People designed it so that not even a Cascade could fully interrupt the offer. It has been present the entire time. Everyone who was within range and did not take it simply was never told it was there. You carry this back to Arlen. When you finish, the node chamber holds a brightness it has not held before — the light of a mind that has received something it has been waiting for and is sitting with it in the specific way of something that has all the time it needs.
